title: Tianhui Plastic Group, as a key enterprise of the Bao Alliance, participated in the research symposium held by Vice Governor Xia Yanjun in Qin
contentHtml:
On July 28, 2020, Xia Yanjun, Vice Governor of the Hebei Provincial People's Government, Hao Jiecheng, Deputy Secretary-General of the Provincial Government, and leaders in charge of the Provincial Department of Industry and Information Technology came to Qin to investigate and convene a symposium on key enterprises of the Baotou Federation. Zhang Ruishu, Mayor of the Qinhuangdao Municipal People's Government, Sun Guosheng, Deputy Mayor, and Municipal Government Secretary-General Yang Xuegong, Haigang District Government District Chief Yun Xinsheng, Development Zone Management Committee Director Su Jingwen and other leaders and leading comrades from the Municipal Financial Supervision Bureau, Municipal Industry and Information Technology Bureau, Municipal Civil Affairs Bureau, Municipal Foreign Affairs and Commerce Bureau, Development Zone Management Committee, and Haigang District Government participated in the discussion.

Zeng Shengwen, chairman of Tianhui Group, attended the meeting as the head of a key Bao Lian enterprise. During the meeting, Zeng Shengwen, chairman of Tianhui Plastics Group, first introduced the company profile and operations of Tianhui Plastics Group in the first half of the year to the research leadership group. In the face of the epidemic, Tianhui Plastics Group actively responded to national, provincial and municipal calls and all employees worked from home. While preventing and controlling the epidemic, we will protect the interests of upstream and downstream customers. By arranging work progress reasonably and effectively, the company achieved full resumption of work and production in early March. In the first half of 2020, sales increased by 155% year-on-year, and the sales volume formulated before the year was well completed.goal. Detailed reports were made on the progress of the projects under construction, Tianhui E-commerce Logistics Park and Tianhui Haojun Network Transportation Platform.

Vice Governor Xia Yanjun gave a favorable response to the Tianhui Plastics Group e-commerce logistics park project.Highly sure,And toConstructive opinions were put forward for enterprise development.


After listening to reports from Qinhuangdao city leaders and other enterprises, Xia Yanjun asked entrepreneurs to increase their confidence, improve industrial manufacturing levels and technological innovation capabilities, and asked relevant provincial and municipal departments to provide key support and assistance to enterprises with good growth potential, strong innovation capabilities, and high technological content.
titleZh: 天晖塑料集团作为包联重点企业参加夏延军副省长来秦调研座谈会
contentHtmlZh:
2020年7月28日，河北省人民政府副省长夏延军、省政府副秘书长郝杰成和省工信厅分管领导来秦调研召开包联重点企业座谈会，秦皇岛市人民政府市长张瑞书、副市长孙国胜、市政府秘书长杨学功、海港区政府区长贠欣昇、开发区管委会主任苏景文等领导和市金融监管局、市工信局、市民政局、市外事商务局、开发区管委会、海港区政府主要负责同志参与座谈。

天晖集团董事长曾胜文作为包联重点企业负责人参加会议，会议期间，天晖塑料集团董事长曾胜文首先向调研领导组介绍了天晖塑料集团的企业概况及上半年运营情况。面对疫情，天晖塑料集团积极响应国家和省市号召，全体员工居家办公。防控疫情的同时，保障上下游客户的利益。合理有效的安排工作进度，3月初企业实现全面复工复产。2020年上半年销量同比增长155%，较好的完成了年前制订的目标。并对在建项目天晖电商物流园、天晖皓俊网络运输平台项目进展进行了详细汇报工作。

夏延军副省长对天晖塑料集团电商物流园项目给予了高度肯定，并对企业发展提出了建设性意见。


在听取了秦皇岛市领导以及其他企业的汇报后，夏延军要求企业家们增强信心，提升工业制造水平和科技创新能力，并要求省市相关部门对于成长性好、创新能力强、科技含量高的企业给与重点扶持和帮助。
